properties.user_story: As a user, I want to log in with email/password so I can access the portal
properties.name: Login
acceptance_criteria: Valid credentials → JWT cookies set (access_token 1h, refresh_token 7d)
Invalid credentials → error message
must_change_password=true → redirect to change-password page (overrides ?from)
MM password synced on successful login
If login page URL has ?from=<sanitized same-origin path> → redirect there after login; else /dashboard

properties.user_story: As a student, I want to register with a promo code so I can join a course group
properties.name: Register via promo code
acceptance_criteria: Valid promo code → User + Enrollment created
MM user created + added to team/channels on registration
Already registered email + correct password → new Enrollment only
Invalid promo → specific error messages

properties.user_story: As a user, I want my session to refresh automatically so I stay logged in
properties.name: Refresh token
acceptance_criteria: Expired access token → auto-refresh via refresh endpoint
Old refresh token deleted + new one issued
Invalid refresh token → redirect to login

properties.user_story: As a user, I want to log out so my session is terminated
properties.name: Logout
acceptance_criteria: Refresh token deleted from DB
Cookies cleared
Redirect to login page

properties.user_story: As a user, I want to change my password (or must change on first login)
properties.name: Change password
acceptance_criteria: Current password verified before change
New password hash saved to DB
All refresh tokens invalidated
New JWT pair issued after change
MM password synced

properties.user_story: As a new user with must_change_password=true, I want to be redirected to change my password before accessing the portal
properties.name: Forced password change
acceptance_criteria: Login returns must_change_password flag
UI redirects to change-password page
After successful change → normal portal access

properties.user_story: As a teacher, I want to see all students in a group with their enrollment status
properties.name: View student list
acceptance_criteria: Table displays name, email, status, promo code, registration date
Filter and sort available on all columns

properties.user_story: As a teacher, I want to block a student so they cannot access portal or MM
properties.name: Block/unblock user
acceptance_criteria: Block sets is_active=false
All refresh tokens deleted on block
MM user deactivated on block
Unblock reverses all block actions

properties.user_story: As a teacher, I want to extend a student enrollment expiration date
properties.name: Extend enrollment
acceptance_criteria: expires_at updated to new date
BullMQ delayed job rescheduled to new expiration

properties.user_story: As a teacher, I want to manually close a student enrollment
properties.name: Close enrollment
acceptance_criteria: Enrollment status → closed
Student removed from MM team
No portal access to group content
